use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Semaphore;

struct TransferService {
    concurrency_limit: Arc<Semaphore>,
}

impl TransferService {
    // GOOD: semaphore created once, shared across all operations
    fn new(max_concurrent: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            concurrency_limit: Arc::new(Semaphore::new(max_concurrent)),
        }
    }

    async fn upload_file(&self, path: &str) -> Result<(), Error> {
        let permit = self.concurrency_limit.acquire().await?;
        
        let data = tokio::fs::read(path).await?;
        send_to_storage(&data).await?;
        
        drop(permit);
        Ok(())
    }

    async fn download_file(&self, url: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, Error> {
        let permit = self.concurrency_limit.acquire().await?;
        
        let data = fetch_from_network(url).await?;
        
        drop(permit);
        Ok(data)
    }
}
